name: SQL Assistant
description: AI-powered SQL assistant. Generate SQL from natural language, explain queries, optimize performance, review security, and generate migrations for SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL. Powered by evolink.ai
author: EvoLinkAI

dataTransmission.api.evolink.ai: AI commands (query, explain, optimize, review, migrate) send user-provided SQL text or descriptions to api.evolink.ai for analysis by Claude. No data is stored after the response is returned. Info commands (databases, cheatsheet) run locally and never transmit data. This skill never connects to any database.
